name: Cherry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker curls and melted margarine; press evenly onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, beat together cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture over the crust; bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
5. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F and continue baking for 25-30 minutes or until set. Loosen the edges of the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing the rim.
6. Chill completely. Top with cherry pie filling just before serving.
